title: BEM-671 fix hourly yaml
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
scripts=Path('scripts'); scripts.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
wfs=Path('.github/workflows'); wfs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
queue=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue'); queue.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
processed=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_processed'); processed.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
triggers=Path('governance/triggers'); triggers.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

# 1) Delivery recorder moved out of YAML.
rec=scripts/'record_curator_hourly_delivery.py'
rec.write_text(sep.join([
'#!/usr/bin/env python3',
'import json',
'from pathlib import Path',
'SEP = bytes.fromhex("0a").decode("ascii")',
'STATE = Path("governance/state/curator_hourly_report_state.json")',
'DELIVERY = Path("governance/tmp/curator_hourly_report_delivery.txt")',
'RESPONSE = Path("governance/tmp/curator_hourly_report_response.json")',
'REPORT = Path("governance/reports/curator_hourly_report_delivery.md")',
'def load_state():',
'    if not STATE.exists():',
'        return {}',
'    try:',
'        return json.loads(STATE.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore"))',
'    except:',
'        return {}',
'def read(path, default="missing"):',
'    return path.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore").strip() if path.exists() else default',
'delivery = read(DELIVERY)',
'state = load_state()',
'state["telegram_delivery"] = delivery',
'state["status"] = "sent" if delivery == "sent" else "not_sent"',
'state["blocker"] = None if delivery == "sent" else {"code":"TELEGRAM_HOURLY_NOT_SENT", "delivery": delivery}',
'STATE.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'STATE.write_text(json.dumps(state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + SEP, encoding="utf-8")',
'REPORT.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'REPORT.write_text("# Curator Hourly Delivery" + SEP + SEP + "Telegram delivery: " + delivery + SEP, encoding="utf-8")',
'print(json.dumps({"telegram_delivery": delivery, "status": state["status"]}, ensure_ascii=False))'
])+sep)

# 2) Stable hourly workflow: no inline Python block, no heredoc, only allowed cron.
hourly=wfs/'curator-hourly-report.yml'
hourly.write_text('''name: Curator Hourly Report

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 * * * *'
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/triggers/curator_hourly_report.trigger'
      - 'scripts/render_curator_hourly_report.py'
      - 'scripts/record_curator_hourly_delivery.py'
      - '.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: curator-hourly-report
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  curator-hourly-report:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Syntax check hourly scripts
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/render_curator_hourly_report.py scripts/record_curator_hourly_delivery.py

      - name: Render hourly report
        run: python3 scripts/render_curator_hourly_report.py

      - name: Send Telegram hourly report
        env:
          TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN }}
          TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p governance/tmp
          if [ -z "$TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN" ] || [ -z "$TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID" ]; then
            echo "not_sent_missing_secret" > governance/tmp/curator_hourly_report_delivery.txt
            printf '{"ok":false,"description":"missing secret"}' > governance/tmp/curator_hourly_report_response.json
          elif [ ! -s governance/tmp/curator_hourly_report_message.txt ]; then
            echo "not_sent_missing_message" > governance/tmp/curator_hourly_report_delivery.txt
            printf '{"ok":false,"description":"missing message"}' > governance/tmp/curator_hourly_report_response.json
          else
            HTTP_CODE=$(curl -sS -o governance/tmp/curator_hourly_report_response.json -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/sendMessage" --data-urlencode "chat_id=${TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID}" --data-urlencode "text@governance/tmp/curator_hourly_report_message.txt" --data-urlencode "parse_mode=Markdown" --data-urlencode "disable_web_page_preview=true" || echo "000")
            if [ "$HTTP_CODE" = "200" ]; then echo "sent" > governance/tmp/curator_hourly_report_delivery.txt; else echo "not_sent_http_${HTTP_CODE}" > governance/tmp/curator_hourly_report_delivery.txt; fi
          fi

      - name: Record delivery status
        run: python3 scripts/record_curator_hourly_delivery.py

      - name: Commit hourly report state
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/state/curator_hourly_report_state.json governance/reports/curator_hourly_report_runtime.md governance/reports/curator_hourly_report_delivery.md
          git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No changes" || git commit -m "BEM-671 curator hourly table delivery state"
          git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
          git push || true
''')

# 3) Clean active queue to stop repeated smoke spam.
removed=[]
for p in queue.glob('*.json'):
    backup=processed/(p.stem+'_removed_by_bem671.json')
    backup.write_text(p.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    p.unlink()
    removed.append(str(p))

# 4) Patch codex-runner queue step to archive processed queue files.
runner=wfs/'codex-runner.yml'
runner_text=runner.read_text(errors='ignore') if runner.exists() else ''
if 'mkdir -p governance/workflow_dispatch_results' in runner_text and 'mkdir -p governance/workflow_dispatch_processed' not in runner_text:
    runner_text=runner_text.replace('mkdir -p governance/workflow_dispatch_results', 'mkdir -p governance/workflow_dispatch_results governance/workflow_dispatch_processed', 1)
if 'mv "$f" "governance/workflow_dispatch_processed/$(basename "$f")"' not in runner_text and 'echo "Dispatched ${WORKFLOW}: ${HTTP_CODE}"' in runner_text:
    runner_text=runner_text.replace('echo "Dispatched ${WORKFLOW}: ${HTTP_CODE}"', 'echo "Dispatched ${WORKFLOW}: ${HTTP_CODE}"\n            mv "$f" "governance/workflow_dispatch_processed/$(basename "$f")"', 1)
runner.write_text(runner_text)

# 5) Trigger only canonical hourly report once; do not queue smoke.
(triggers/'curator_hourly_report.trigger').write_text('BEM-671 trigger fixed canonical hourly report 2026-05-18 | 18:57 (UTC+3)'+sep)

protocol=protocols/'HOURLY_REPORT_YAML_AND_QUEUE_CLEANUP.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-671 | Hourly Report YAML And Queue Cleanup'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 18:57 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Fixes: delivery recorder is now a standalone script, `curator-hourly-report.yml` has no inline Python block, and workflow dispatch queue items are archived after handling so smoke messages do not repeat every task.'+sep)

# 6) Static checks.
hourly_text=hourly.read_text(errors='ignore')
runner_text=runner.read_text(errors='ignore') if runner.exists() else ''
checks=[
 {'name':'delivery_recorder_exists','pass':rec.exists(),'evidence':str(rec)},
 {'name':'hourly_workflow_exists','pass':hourly.exists(),'evidence':str(hourly)},
 {'name':'hourly_has_only_allowed_cron','pass':"cron: '0 * * * *'" in hourly_text,'evidence':str(hourly)},
 {'name':'hourly_uses_recorder_script','pass':'python3 scripts/record_curator_hourly_delivery.py' in hourly_text,'evidence':str(hourly)},
 {'name':'hourly_has_no_inline_python_block','pass':'python3 - <<' not in hourly_text,'evidence':str(hourly)},
 {'name':'queue_is_empty_after_cleanup','pass':not any(queue.glob('*.json')),'evidence':str(queue)},
 {'name':'runner_archives_queue_items','pass':'workflow_dispatch_processed' in runner_text and 'mv "$f"' in runner_text,'evidence':str(runner)}
]
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
status='pass' if not failed else 'failed'
blocker=None if status=='pass' else {'code':'HOURLY_YAML_OR_QUEUE_CLEANUP_FAILED','failed':failed}
state={'schema_version':'hourly_yaml_and_dispatch_queue_cleanup.v1','bem':'BEM-671','status':status,'checks':checks,'removed_queue_files':removed,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 18:57 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem671_fix_hourly_yaml_and_dispatch_queue_cleanup.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem671_fix_hourly_yaml_and_dispatch_queue_cleanup.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-671 | Fix Hourly YAML And Dispatch Queue Cleanup | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 18:57 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Checks'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+x['name']+': '+('PASS' if x['pass'] else 'FAIL') for x in checks])+sep+sep+'## Removed queue files'+sep+(sep.join(['- '+x for x in removed]) if removed else 'none')+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem671_fix_hourly_yaml_and_dispatch_queue_cleanup','cycle_id':'bem671-fix-hourly-yaml-and-dispatch-queue-cleanup','source':'executor','status':status,'removed_queue_files':removed,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 18:57 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem671_fix_hourly_yaml_and_dispatch_queue_cleanup']={'status':status,'state_file':str(state_file),'removed_queue_files':removed,'blocker':blocker}
contour_state['hourly_report_yaml_status']='fixed' if status=='pass' else 'failed'
contour_state['workflow_dispatch_queue_status']='cleanup_enabled' if status=='pass' else 'cleanup_failed'
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 18:57 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem671_fix_hourly_yaml_and_dispatch_queue_cleanup.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-671 '+status.upper()+': hourly workflow inline YAML fixed and dispatch queue cleanup enabled.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(rec),str(hourly),str(runner),str(triggers/'curator_hourly_report.trigger'),str(protocol),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)]+[str(processed/(Path(x).stem+'_removed_by_bem671.json')) for x in removed])
ops_applied.append('Fixed curator-hourly-report invalid YAML by moving delivery recorder into a script and cleaned dispatch queue to stop repeated Telegram smoke messages')
"""
No issue comments.
